description: You are an Operations Research Analyst preparing data for a workforce optimization model in the Oracle HR schema (localhost:1521/XEPDB1, User: hr, Password: hr123). Create a view named ORG_HIERARCHY_VW using hierarchical queries (CONNECT BY) with columns for EMPLOYEE_ID, FULL_NAME (First Last), JOB_ID, DEPARTMENT_NAME, MANAGER_NAME, HIERARCHY_LEVEL, and a pipe-delimited REPORTING_PATH. Create a view named SALARY_BAND_ANALYTICS_VW using window functions to include EMPLOYEE_ID, FULL_NAME, DEPARTMENT_NAME, SALARY, DEPT_SALARY_RANK, SALARY_QUARTILE, DEVIATION_FROM_DEPT_AVG (rounded to 2 decimals), and PREV_HIRE_SALARY. Create a table named DEPT_JOB_CROSSTAB using the PIVOT operator to show headcount by Department and Job Family (first 2 letters of JOB_ID) for families AD, FI, IT, SA, PU, ST, SH, HR, MK, AC, PR, and TOTAL_HEADCOUNT. Export these three objects to /home/ga/Desktop/org_hierarchy.csv, /home/ga/Desktop/salary_analytics.csv, and /home/ga/Desktop/dept_job_matrix.csv.
